markdownRemark.html:
As salāmu ʿalaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

There is a campout planned for both brothers and sisters during the weekend of July 18th and the weekend of August 8th at Fitzroy Provincial Park, Fitzroy Ḥarbour, Ontario see map.

Keep these dates for your future camping plans! Plan ahead!

More detailed information will come, in-sha’Allāh.

BarakAllāhu fīkum.
